tagline: Family-run concrete pumping in the North Bay since 1981
seoDescription: Redwood Concrete Pump — family-owned, woman-owned concrete line and boom pumping serving Santa Rosa, Sonoma, Napa & Marin counties since 1981.
heroHeading: The North Bay's longest-running concrete pumping family, since 1981
heroSubheading: ACPA-certified operators placing concrete cleanly and efficiently across Sonoma, Napa, and Marin counties.
aboutBody: Redwood Concrete Pump is a multi-generational, family-owned business that has been placing concrete across the North Bay since 1981. The Worden family treats every yard of concrete with care, getting the mud exactly where your crew needs it — from the ready-mix truck straight into your forms.

As a Certified Woman Business Enterprise and a registered public works subcontractor, Redwood handles everything from complex commercial and public works pours to tight-access residential jobs. Their ACPA-certified operators are known for being efficient, clean, and patient on every site.

services.title: Commercial concrete pumping
services.description: Slab-on-grade, drilled pier foundations, tilt-up walls, post-tension slabs, and public works infrastructure.

services.title: Residential concrete pumping
services.description: Foundations, driveways, patios, pool decks, walkways, retaining walls, and ADU pours — including difficult-access sites.

services.title: Drilled piers & foundations
services.description: Pier foundations and structural concrete for solar arrays, decks, and hillside projects.

services.title: Specialty pumping
services.description: Well seals and abatements, void filling, lightweight multi-story pumping, and pump/operator rental.

services.title: Public works & infrastructure
services.description: Registered public works subcontractor for municipal, utility, and ADA infrastructure pours.

testimonials.quote: Yesterday we had 6 yards of concrete delivered. Their pump guy was efficient, clean and patient. The whole operation went very smoothly.
testimonials.author: Douglas Bryant

testimonials.quote: Do yourself a favor and hire here guys. Their rates are reasonable and worth the exceptional service qualities.
testimonials.author: Rod A.

testimonials.quote: We had a semi difficult pour of 7 yards delivered to Bolinas. Their pump guy was efficient, clean and patient.
testimonials.author: Daniel Sereni

notes: No reliable aggregate star rating found — BBB is A+ (not accredited, no star count); Facebook shows 'not yet rated, 4 reviews'; Google count unverified — so rating field omitted. Site brands founding as 1981 (Worden family legacy); BBB lists a 1992 business registration date — human should confirm which to display. Second phone listed on site: 707-254-1206 (Napa). WBE #1600964, DIR #1000010460. Photo list filtered to their own trucks/jobsites; dropped logos, license certificates, review screenshots, map embed, client logos, and portrait/stock files.
